title: potentilla × tonguei
intro: Potentilla × tonguei, also known as the tongue's potentilla, is a hybrid flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Potentilla × tonguei include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared through herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
